current.summary: Pause skill.md spec implementation to align terminology (platforms vs providers vs harnesses) across specs before writing fields

activeWork.description: Implementing skill.md front matter spec from agent ecosystem; discovered terminology inconsistency must be resolved first
activeWork.progress: Identified: spec says 'supported agent platforms', syllago uses 'providers', other tools use 'harnesses'. Need to research and lock vocabulary before implementing. This prevents tech debt from inconsistent naming baked into code.
blockers: Terminology not standardized across agent ecosystem spec, syllabo, and other tools

recentDecisions: Pause implementation to research and align terminology before writing code
Spec vocabulary must be locked down as source of truth before tooling implements fields
nextSteps: Research terminology usage: agent ecosystem spec definition, syllago provider naming, other tools (harnesses?)
Document standardized vocabulary for skill.md front matter sections
Align syllabo converter/toolmap.go terminology if needed
Resume spec implementation with locked vocabulary

context.notes: Terminology consistency is the 'through line' for understanding across the spec ecosystem. Implementing with inconsistent naming creates compounding tech debt. Front-load vocabulary alignment before implementing fields that bake in a specific term.
